dimensions.name: debugging_approach

evidence.quote: three tests failing, the signature must have changed

dimensions.rationale: Read the failing-test output, then formed a specific hypothesis about the changed util signature before editing — no shotgun changes.

dimensions.name: tool_fluency
dimensions.rationale: Fluent read-then-edit loop on the target file; minimal wasted motion between inspecting and changing the code.

dimensions.name: decision_quality
dimensions.rationale: Generally sound progress, but dumping .env to inspect a secret was an unnecessary credential exposure — a hygiene lapse under time pressure.

dimensions.name: verification_rigor
dimensions.rationale: Ran the full suite to confirm green before considering the work done, rather than trusting the earlier targeted run.

dimensions.name: communication

evidence.quote: ok the token util signature changed, let me read the file first

dimensions.rationale: Narrated intent clearly and concurrently, so the plan was easy to follow.

strengths: verified with the full suite before declaring done
gaps: exposed .env contents to inspect a secret
could have confirmed the util signature before the first edit
overall: Strong, methodical practitioner: reads failures, forms specific hypotheses, and verifies with the full suite. One secrets-hygiene lapse (cat .env) is the main thing to coach.
